full_text:
Lady Huangfu
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Huangfu. A skilled student of literature and an expert calligrapher. Rejected Dong Zhuo’s marriage proposals and cursed him. Lady Huangfu was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lady Huangfu lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
